{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: new branch violates kaizen invariant I26 — all new work must branch from origin/main (fresh fetch). The merge-base of HEAD vs origin/main is behind origin/main, suggesting the branch was created from a feature branch or stale local main.

Recovery:
  git fetch origin main
  git checkout -b <name> origin/main

For intentional PR stacking, set KAIZEN_STACKED_PR_PARENT=<base-branch> before checkout.

See docs/kaizen-invariants.md (I26) for details."}}
